title: polystichum munitum f. nudatum
intro: Polystichum munitum f. nudatum, also known as Western sword fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Western sword fern include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Polystichum munitum f. nudatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote healing.
